member.name: M:GTA.Entity.ApplyForce(GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.ForceType)
member.param: The direction to apply the force relative to world coordinates.

The offset from the root bone of this
where the force applies. "rotation" is incorrectly named parameter but is left for scripts that use the method with named parameters.
Type of the force to apply.
